Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys data=json.load\(sys.stdin\) # get last 20 requests for item in data[-20:]: text = item.get\(''text'',''''\) print\(text[:200]\) print\(''---''\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys, re content = sys.stdin.read\(\) # Find all URLs with quotation and their status matches = re.findall\(r''quotation[^\\]]*?\\] \(\\d{3}\)'', content\) print\(''quotation statuses:'', matches[:10]\) # Find any error codes errors = re.findall\(r''quotation.*?→ \(\\d{3}\)'', content\) print\(''quotation responses:'', errors[:10]\) # Look for any 404/500 responses all_errors = re.findall\(r''\(GET|POST\) \(https://[^\\s]+quotation[^\\s]*\) → \(\\d+\)'', content\) print\(''quotation requests:'', all_errors[:10]\) ")
